subcodes.first_line: The Book of God hath been revealed in truth, and beareth witness unto that which the Wronged One hath testified from His glorious station, declaring: Verily, friendship is as the sun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الله ظهر بالحق و شهد بما شهد المظلوم فی مقامه الکریم و یقول ان الصداقة هی شمس
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
